journeymap.overlay.tfc_rock_layers.name: TFC Rock Layers
journeymap.overlay.tfc_rock_layers.descr: Shows surface rock types from TerraFirmaCraft.
journeymap.overlay.tfc_precipitation.des: Shows rainfall amounts from TerraFirmaCraft as a heatmap.
journeymap.overlay.tfc_temperature.name: TFC Temperature
journeymap.overlay.tfc_temperature.descr: Shows average temperatures from TerraFirmaCraft as a heatmap.
config.journeymap.rockLayerEnabled.toolt: Display TFC rock layer types on JourneyMap.
config.journeymap.precipitationEnabled.t: Display TFC rainfall as a heatmap on JourneyMap.
config.journeymap.temperatureEnabled.too: Display TFC temperature as a heatmap on JourneyMap.
config.journeymap.showLegend.tooltip: Show color legend on the map for active overlays.
mod.journeymaptfcintegration.name: JourneyMap TFC Integration
mod.journeymaptfcintegration.description: Adds TerraFirmaCraft climate and rock layer overlays to JourneyMap.
